pageContext.name: Spider-Man Peter B. Parker
pageContext.description: 'Alright people, let's do this one last time! My name is Peter B. Parker'  Based on the hit movie Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse, Sentinel is excited to present 'Peter B. Parker' as the second character of our new SV-ACTION figure series! This fully articulated figure allows you to replicate various cool and vivid battle scenes as well as funny everyday life as seen in the movie.  It comes with a huge selection of optional parts including 2 heads for the Spider-Man suit, 3 Peter Heads revealing his real face, multiple hand parts for different poses to effect parts and objects like mug, glasses, and a newspaper.  Come and have that movie experience in your hands!
